h37960171g2d1ag431cgb59fg62641b9bf71a: Chins up, children. It's the Blade of Frontiers!
h000f680cg8069g4a6egb2c5gf50fbb89e744: They've been talking about you. They hope you're going to come with us. Could you spare them a few words?
h8ace849fgcaa5g49f8ga075gc56d7475cd64: Swords up, children. It's the Blade of Frontiers!
h7c4175c3g7c73g473fg8b50g90e95d9fdc77: Swords up, children. It's the Blade of Frontiers!
h44e20678g6d2bg4b73g906fgbc530d1bd793: They've been talking about you. They hope you're going to come with us. Could you lift their spirits, maybe spare them a story or two?
hd1341949gdc7bg4435g9126g635414af983f: You're teaching them to fight? They're mere children!
hba3c3eb8ga3c6g4139gbb48g899d7c8e395f: It's that or teach them to beg for their lives.
h80e4019fg043fg4868ga490g0434ab27819c: The goblins will chase us to Baldur's Gate - and the kids know it.
h3ec4c720gcc56g4d1bga01cg2c9492ed5553: Please, just a quick story. It would really make their day.
h8039e911g5d2cg4385g8a54g8c6af7c8d055: Hardly necessary. I'll raid the goblin camp and kill them myself.
he6311cd7g8bdag48e8ga5b0g35b84dfe7052: I won't be part of this. You'll get them all killed.
h7144fd74ga90ag495egac3fgd04138fb87e7: Were you trying to scare them? Ugh - I'd better take care of this.
h0df9796dge77bg47afgb4c4g6f87af814479: I frightened the feathers off an owlbear with a single roar.
h9f87bcb4g189fg4835g82edgfe5c0551e5d6: Hear that, children? An owlbear! Do you have another?
h6fe5f4a9g4af2g49a8g94dfg403fc1e1d59f: I wrestled a swamp croc... naked!
hd39f4908gd827g4f0agb290gc96f2690746b: I hope you'll live up to both your reputation and your promise. Thank you.
h84ad79bcgf618g431bga663g3a610cf03bee: Thank you. I prefer when they smile.
h1c920f53g97ccg4329gb1bfg40b00671f2ee: I've bested a red dragon in battle, and crafted a club from its tooth!
h15a4b79cga8a6g434agb85ag8fc0f47775e1: I once roped a catoblepas and rode it like a horse!
h2cdc850dg32abg4cd6gbfa7gac6aec7c24c0: I climbed the Ice Mountains and stabbed a yeti with an icicle.
h1411a50ag407fg4a85gb5eag4cda82656396: Hear that, children? A yeti! Do you have another?
h3b602532g6ce4g4e25gb0a4g42e79bbdef3b: Bad news, children: you're all going to die.
